case_title: LEUNG, ALEX KIN FAI, INDIVIDUALLY vs. MACONNI, ROCCO ARMANI INDIVIDUALLY et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEUNG, ALEX KIN FAI, INDIVIDUALLY AS TO DEFENDANT MACONNI, ROCCO ARMANI INDIVIDUALLY DOES 1 THROUGH 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          DEC-11-1998 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-13-1998 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       NOV-23-1998

PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS & COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEUNG, ALEX KIN FAI, INDIVIDUALLY SERVED SEP-03-1998, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MACONNI, ROCCO ARMANI INDIVIDUALLY

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-11-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT, OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY SHANG WADE VINCENT. HEARING SET FOR JAN-20-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT MACONNI, ROCCO ARMANI INDIVIDUALLY

OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-20-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $300.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JAN-20-1999, TO OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY SHANG WADE VINCENT, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-04-1999 CONTINUED FROM JAN-20-1999 TO FEB-24-1999 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
PHOTOCOPY FOR MACONNI, ROCCO ARMANI INDIVIDUALLY
